summary: Happy path: confirm intro, push past health issues, let the agent pick + install the provider variant, delete installed skills.

variations.name: default
variations.summary: linear / anthropic / sonnet — parity with main

path.auto: dismiss outage — proceed even if the readiness probe flags an issue

(external) — the agent loads the skill menu, picks the ai-observability-* variant matching the project's LLM SDK (wizard_ask answered with the first option if ambiguous), installs it, and instruments the LLM calls
delete — leave nothing behind (terminal: the run's done-signal)
